title: Salespeak 7
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Salespeak 7''' was a small [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] specifically designed to translate [[Shyriiwook/Legends|Shyriiwook]] into [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]]. While useful in [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] relations, misapplication by various nefarious factions occurred nonetheless. A group of aggressive Wookiee con-artists led to a scam utilizing the Salespeak 7's abilities to market a subscription to the ''[[Coruscant Journal]]''.

==Sources==
*<!-- 2001-08-07 -->[[Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide (real-life book)|''Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide'']]
